notes.f1: Birth date recovered exactly (10 Mar 1775); place not on the birth fact (Albany appears only on the retained christening). Same shape as run 1.
notes.f2: Exact death date recovered this run (28 Feb 1819) after reaching Find A Grave with the raised wall-clock cap; death place (Niskayuna/Schenectady) not attached to the fact. Big improvement over run 1's wrong bounded 'bef 3 Apr 1819, Albany County'.
notes.f3: Burial locality recovered on the subject (Niskayuna, Schenectady, New York) but not the specific cemetery ('Niskayuna Reformed Church Cemetery'); no burial date. Run 1 never reached this finding (timed out).
